name: codeterm-plugins
description: Andrey's CodeTerm capability plugins — Git, Transcriber, Bitwarden. Authored in TypeScript against @codeterm/plugin-sdk, built to QuickJS-compatible plugin.js + split UI bundles.

scripts.build:all: node scripts/build-plugin.mjs git && node scripts/build-plugin.mjs bitwarden && node scripts/build-plugin.mjs transcriber && node scripts/build-plugin.mjs lmstudio && node scripts/build-plugin.mjs chat-preprocessor
scripts.test: npx tsx git/plugin.test.cjs && npx tsx bitwarden/plugin.test.cjs && npx tsx lmstudio/plugin.test.cjs && npx tsx chat-preprocessor/plugin.test.cjs
